zh.lifeSummary: 當Baron John II De Lyons於1268年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾瓦可沃斯時，他的父親Richard de Lyons26歲，母親Emma Tew25歲。他於1288年與Margery Oakley在英國諾薩普頓史爾格亞特 歐克麗結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1312年在英國諾圖波藍德瓦可沃斯享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Baron John II De Lyons于1268年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾瓦可沃斯时，他的父亲Richard de Lyons26岁，母亲Emma Tew25岁。他于1288年与Margery Oakley在英国諾薩普頓史爾格亞特 歐克麗结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1312年在英国諾圖波藍德瓦可沃斯享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lyons
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: adopted for Ó Laighin (see Lyne , Lane , Lyon ) or Ó Liatháin (see Lehane ).

variants.name: Lyon
meanings: Scottish, English, and French: from the personal name Middle English Lyon, Old French Leon (from Latin leo ‘lion’, or the cognate Greek leōn; see Leon ). Compare Lyall .
Scottish and English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Lyons-la-Forêt in Eure, Normandy. It is unlikely to be from the better-known southern French city of Lyon (see 5 below).

English and French: nickname from Middle English lioun ‘lion’ (Old English, Latin leo), Old French leon, perhaps applied to a brave, fierce, or proud person, or one with a shaggy mane of hair. Compare Lion .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Baron John II De Lyons was born in 1268, in Warkworth, Northamptonshire, England, his father, Richard de Lyons, was 26 and his mother, Emma Tew, was 25. He married Margery Oakley in 1288, in Great Oakley, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1312, in Warkworth, Northumberland, England, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Baron John II De Lyons est né en 1268, à Warkworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Lyons, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Emma Tew, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Margery Oakley en 1288, à Great Oakley, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1312, à Warkworth, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Baron John II De Lyons 1268 in Warkworth, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard de Lyons 26 und seine Mutter Emma Tew 25. Er hat 1288 in Great Oakley, Northamptonshire, England Margery Oakley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1312 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Warkworth, Northumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Baron John II De Lyons è nato il nel 1268 nel Warkworth, Northamptonshire, England, il suo padre, Richard de Lyons, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Emma Tew, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Margery Oakley nel 1288, nel Great Oakley, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1312, nel Warkworth, Northumberland, England, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Baron John II De Lyonsが1268年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアワークウオルスで生まれた時，父Richard de Lyonsは26歳，母Emma Tewは25歳であった。1288年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアグレアト オアクリーでMargery Oakleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1312年にイギリスノースウンバーランドワークウオルスで44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Baron John II De Lyons(이)가 1268년 영국 노르섬프토실르 워k워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Lyons(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma Tew(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1288년 영국 노르섬프토실르 그리트 클리에서 Margery Oakley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1312년 영국 노르스벌랜드 워k워스에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Baron John II De Lyons nasceu em 1268, em Warkworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard de Lyons, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Emma Tew, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery Oakley em 1288, em Great Oakley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1312, em Warkworth, Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Baron John II De Lyons родился в 1268 г. в местности варкворт, нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard de Lyons было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma Tew, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery Oakley в 1288 г. в местности грит оакли, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1312 г. в местности варкворт, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Baron John II De Lyons nació en 1268, en Warkworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard de Lyons, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Emma Tew, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Margery Oakley en 1288, en Great Oakley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1312, en Warkworth, Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 44 años.
